name: Stab
desc: Deal 100% ATK Damage.

name: Block
desc: Add 100% DEF Block.

name: Shark Bite
desc: Deal 50% ATK Damage, but has +50% to deal a Critical Hit.

name: Scuttling
desc: Deal 75% ATK Damage, but lower enemy ATK by 25%.

name: Sharp Vortex
desc: Deal 150% ATK Damage, but lose 5% HP.

name: Sharp Scales
desc: Add 80% DEF Block, but gain 20% ATK of Thorns

name: Seeing Red
desc: Gain +1 Energy next turn. Increase ATK Damage by 15%.

name: Torpedo Dash
desc: Deal 50% ATK Damage to all enemies.

name: Sharpened Hook
desc: Increase critical hit chance by +50% this turn.

name: Sharp Shield
desc: Add 50% DEF Block and +50% Thorns.

name: Return to Sender
desc: Return the Damage received this turn with Thorns.

name: Smooth Shield
desc: Gain +50% of the current Block amount, but reduces Thorns to 0 this turn.

name: Phalanx Formation
desc: Get +1 Energy next turn and start next turn with 25% DEF of Block.

name: Shield Bonk
desc: Deal Damage equivalent to the current Block amount.

name: Cactus Shrapnel
desc: Add Block amount to Thorns damage. Reduce Block by 50%.

name: Heavy Armour
desc: Double the current Block amount.

name: Red Shot
desc: Increase ATK by +50% and deal 50% ATK Damage.

name: Blue Shot
desc: Increase DEF by +50% and add 50% DEF Block.

name: Disarmed
desc: Lower all enemies ATK by 33%.

name: Ground-Rooted
desc: Heal 25% of full HP, but lower DEF by 50% and Dodge chance to 0% for this turn.

name: Radioactive Shot
desc: Apply Poison Status to and enemy for 3 turns.

name: Explosive Reagent
desc: Deal 100% ATK Damage to all enemies with a Status.

name: Energy Convertion
desc: Add 100% DEF Block for each enemy with a Status.

name: Counter Attack
desc: Dodging will trigger a counter attack dealing 100% of the incoming damage.

name: Big Shot
desc: Deal 200% ATK Damage, but you need to pay $150.

name: Bought Out
desc: Add 200% DEF Block, but you need to pay $150.

name: Lucky Penny
desc: Deal 25% ATK Damage, but gain $75.

name: Interview
desc: Lower all enemy ATK by 25% and increase ATK by 25%.

name: Treasure Flex
desc: Deal 20% ATK Damage for every $100. No need to pay!

name: Private Doctor
desc: Heal 35% of your full HP, but you need to pay $1500.

name: Counter Lawsuit
desc: Gain $10 per Block Amount.

name: Ghostly Apparition
desc: Deal 25% ATK Damage and gain +1 Energy next turn.

name: Yurei's Aura
desc: Gain +25% of the current Block amount for every enemy present.

name: Cold Breeze
desc: Gain +25% ATK for every enemy present.

name: Black Magic
desc: Remove all Status element inflicted on the user.

name: Body Shield
desc: Deal 50% ATK Damage and gain Block equivalent to the Damage dealt.

name: Broken Bone
desc: Deal 15% of an enemy's current HP.

name: Corrosive Bomb
desc: Each time an enemy is defeated this turn, deal 33% ATK to all enemies.

name: Blood Glass
desc: Heal 20% of the damage dealt this turn.
